ABOUT.TITLE: About us
ABOUT.P1: BOCCONI SRL is specialized in services for the automotive and industrial sector, with a complete operational structure in Massafra.
ABOUT.P2: We provide technical expertise, speed and customer focus at every stage: from vehicle sales to workshop support and specialized services.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: Simplifying complexity through code, bringing innovation and value to every project we realize.
